items.title: Layer 1 — ranking output honesty guardrails pass
steps: 1. npx vitest run src/__tests__/service.ranking-output-guardrails.test.ts
items.evidence: 27 tests passed (vitest, 2026-07-18); tsc 0 errors; check:conventions --strict 0 structural violations
items.notes: From the sibling ranking-owner-surface slice (PR #186), not PR #212.

items.title: Ranking card speaks the owner's vocabulary (per org-type, non-healthcare supported)
items.precondition: authed on an org whose type resolves to a non-healthcare vocabulary
steps: 1. Load the practice-ranking output for the org
2. Read the recommendation copy
items.expected: copy uses the org's vocabulary tokens, not hardcoded healthcare terms
items.notes: closes on dev after the dev/dave -> sandbox clone; sandbox has no ranking data to render. Sibling slice (PR #186), not PR #212.

items.title: No generic 'get more reviews' homework unless it names a real competitor gap
items.precondition: authed on an org with ranking output that could trigger a generic recommendation
steps: 1. Load the ranking output
2. Confirm any review/homework recommendation names a specific competitor gap, or is dropped
items.expected: banned generic homework is suppressed unless competitor-specific; no false state-claims in fallback copy
items.evidence: Layer 1 covers the guardrail logic in unit (service.ranking-output-guardrails.test.ts); behavioral confirmation pending the clone
items.notes: closes on dev after the clone. Sibling slice (PR #186), not PR #212.

items.title: #212 gauge-accuracy — Layer 1 unit + gates pass
steps: 1. npx vitest run frontend/src/components/dashboard/rankings-hub/rankingsHubDerivation.test.ts
2. npx vitest run src/__tests__/client-gbp-display.test.ts
3. npx tsc --noEmit  (backend)  &&  (cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit)
4. npm run check:conventions -- --strict
items.expected: 16/16 frontend derivation tests green; backend client-gbp-display tests green; tsc 0 new errors both trees; check:conventions --strict 0 backend structural violations
items.notes: PR body reports green (16/16 derivation; 2204 backend tests; strict 0) and mutation-verified (reinstating 4.5 / default-ok / || 0 / one-business denominator each fails its falsifier). NOT re-run in this read-only review; code review corroborates the logic and the gbpData shape-match.

items.title: #212 defect #1 — no invented 4.5 market rating
items.precondition: A client whose competitor set is empty or has no RATED competitors (identify via admin ranking data). One Endodontics if its set is thin.
steps: 1. Sign in to https://dev.getalloro.com as a user for the target client (or via admin impersonation).
2. Open the client dashboard -> Local Rankings (RankingsHubSurface).
3. Read the 'Rating vs Market' vital tile.
items.expected: Market side renders '—' (e.g. '4.9 / —'), never '/ 4.5'. Unrated competitors are skipped, not folded in as 0. If the practice itself is unrated, the whole tile is '—'.

items.title: #212 defect #2 — rank and denominator share one universe
items.precondition: A client with a confirmed Maps rank (searchStatus 'ok') whose SerpApi searchResults set is present. One Endodontics (has ranking data).
steps: 1. Sign in to https://dev.getalloro.com for the client.
2. Open Local Rankings.
3. Read the hero '#N of M nearby'.
4. Cross-check M against the SerpApi searchResults count, NOT the curated/selected competitor count.
items.expected: 'of M' shows only when M is the SerpApi searchResults universe and M>1 and M>=N. When that set is absent, one-business, or smaller than N, the rank shows alone with no 'of M'. The curated competitor count is never the denominator. (Disclosed limit: M is capped at the top-20 set.)

items.title: #212 defect #2 — a null Maps status prints no rank
items.precondition: A client whose latest ranking run has searchStatus null/unconfirmed (not 'ok').
steps: 1. Open that client's Local Rankings on https://dev.getalloro.com.
2. Read the hero.
items.expected: No confident '#N' renders; the not-ranked message shows (e.g. 'Local search estimate pending'). A null status no longer defaults to 'ok'.

items.title: #212 defect #9 — absent review data renders '—'; a measured 0 renders honestly
items.precondition: Two clients: (a) one whose GBP review scrape returned nothing (absent) AND whose ranking was re-run AFTER this deploy — the backend fix is forward-only, so pre-fix stored rows keep a baked-in 0; (b) one with a genuine measured 0 recent reviews.
steps: 1. Open client (a) Local Rankings on https://dev.getalloro.com.
2. Read the 'Reviews' StatBox sub-line and the 'Rating vs Market' tile.
3. Open client (b) and read the same fields.
items.expected: (a) Absent -> sub-line reads 'All-time total · recent activity not measured' and the rating side shows '—'; never '0 reviews last 30 days' or '0.0'. (b) Measured 0 -> shows '0 reviews last 30 days' honestly and preserves a real 0 rating.
items.notes: Forward-only backend fix (util.client-gbp-display persists via realOrNull/?? null). Checking (a) on an existing row WITHOUT a post-deploy re-run will still show the old fabricated 0 — expected per the PR's disclosed scope, not a failure of this item.

items.title: #212 no-regression — a fully populated primary still renders real numbers
items.precondition: One Endodontics (seeded, fully populated ranking data).
steps: 1. Open One Endodontics Local Rankings on https://dev.getalloro.com.
2. Read the hero rank, the Reviews StatBox, and Rating vs Market.
items.expected: Real values still render: a real '#N (of M)', a real 'N reviews last 30 days', and a real 'you / market' rating. The honesty fix must NOT null-out data that is actually present.
items.notes: Guards against the shape-mismatch failure mode where buildClientGbpDisplayFields could over-null real data. Verified safe in code review (same source paths as clientPracticeData), pinned behaviorally here.
